description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this white handbag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Made of nylon for enhanced durability Roomy inner compartment with a small zippered pocket and a smaller pouch A small zippered compartment at the back Graphic print on the front with embroidery Brand name and logo printed below design Brand badge appliqued on the front Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
